headline: MSCI Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y, Shares Up
summary: MSCI's Q1'26 earnings beat estimates as revenues jump 14% and margins expand, fueled by asset-based fees and recurring subscriptions.
